name: Tim
goal: He aims to find a holiday resort that offers a diverse range of outdoor activities and amenities to cater to his family's varied interests and ensure a memorable summer vacation.
backstory: Tim has been tasked with planning his family's summer vacation for the past few years and has always tried to find a resort that caters to everyone's interests. He remembers a particularly successful trip to a beachside resort that offered a variety of activities, which is why he's keen on finding something similar this year. His personal preference is for resorts with plenty of outdoor activities, such as hiking and water sports.

focus_notes.cost: For Tim, cost is an important consideration, but not the only one - he's willing to splurge on a resort that offers exceptional activities and amenities, as long as it fits within the family's overall budget.
focus_notes.comfort: Tim prioritizes comfort when choosing a resort, looking for places with clean and spacious accommodations, as well as plenty of opportunities for relaxation and leisure, ensuring a rejuvenating experience for all.
focus_notes.time: With a busy schedule, Tim wants to make the most of their summer vacation and is looking for a resort that offers a range of activities and experiences that can be enjoyed in a short amount of time, maximizing their limited time off.
focus_notes.safety: As the activity planner, Tim is particularly concerned with safety, researching resorts that have a good track record of ensuring guest safety and offering guided activities to minimize risk, giving everyone peace of mind during the trip.
focus_notes.flexibility_focus: Tim values flexibility when it comes to resort activities and amenities, preferring places that offer a range of options to cater to different interests and energy levels, allowing each family member to create their own unique experience.
